name: zillow
description: Zillow — extracts listings from home, search results, the property detail overlay shown on search, and the standalone property detail page.
notes: Router-based formatter. Detects page type from URL plus the presence of a property-detail overlay region (search results can show an inline overlay; the formatter merges overlay data when present). Output includes a listingCount extra field. The detail formatter exposes save/share/hide/more buttons via refs.
